step2.customerArchetype: Shoppers tired of mass-market homewares who want one well-made piece with a story behind it
step2.painPoints: Listings online look the same; can't tell what's truly handmade vs drop-shipped
step2.desiredOutcomes: A piece they'll keep for years, and a maker they recognize on a second purchase

step4.missionStatement: Make things that outlast the trend that sold them.

step5.originSummary: Started in a garage workshop after years of buying disposable goods I knew I could make better.
step5.motivation: Wanted to prove that small batches and honest materials still have a market.

step7.differentiation: Every piece made by one person you can name, with materials sourced where I can stand by the supply chain.
